goal: Restore the failing Docker Publish GitHub Actions workflow without weakening validation.
deliverable: A Docker publish workflow patch that installs dependencies before validate_project plus a follow-up main push to trigger a rerun.
constraints: Limit remediation to workflow configuration unless a new concrete failure appears
Preserve the current release and publish behavior
acceptance_criteria: Local validation still passes after the workflow change
The fix is pushed to origin/main so the workflow can rerun
non_goals: Broader CI refactors unrelated to the observed failure
